documentation.title: Vendda.co Product Guide
documentation.description: Complete guide for business owners to manage their online store

categories.title: Authentication
categories.description: Learn how to manage your account security and access

guides.title: How to Create an Account
guides.description: Step-by-step guide to signing up for Vendda.co

content.introduction: Creating an account on Vendda.co is quick and easy. Follow these steps to get started with your online store.

steps.title: Visit Vendda.co
steps.description: Navigate to the https://Vendda.co homepage in your web browser

steps.title: Click Sign Up
steps.description: Look for the 'Sign Up' or 'Get Started' button, usually located in the top right corner, or simply go to https://Vendda.co/register

steps.title: Fill in Your Details
steps.description: Enter your business name, email address, phone number, and create a strong password (minimum 8 characters)

steps.title: Accept Terms
steps.description: Read and accept the Terms and Conditions

steps.title: Create Account
steps.description: Click the 'Create Account' button to proceed

steps.title: Verify Email
steps.description: Check your email inbox for a verification OTP

steps.title: Activate Account
steps.description: Enter the verification OTP to activate your account

tips: Use a strong password with a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols
Make sure to use a valid email address you have access to
Keep your login credentials secure

guides.title: How to Login
guides.description: Access your Vendda.co account

content.introduction: Login to your Vendda.co account to manage your store and products.

steps.title: Go to Vendda.co
steps.description: Visit the Vendda.co website

steps.title: Click Login
steps.description: Click the 'Login' button in the top right corner or go to https://vendda.co/login

steps.title: Enter Credentials
steps.description: Enter your registered email address and password

steps.title: Sign In
steps.description: Click 'Sign In' to access your dashboard

tips: Check 'Remember Me' if using a secure, personal device
Clear your browser cache if you experience login issues

guides.title: How to Change Password
guides.description: Update your account password for better security

content.introduction: Regularly changing your password helps keep your account secure.

steps.title: Login to Account
steps.description: Access your Vendda.co account

steps.title: Open Settings
steps.description: Click your profile icon and select 'Settings' or 'Account Settings'

steps.title: Navigate to Security
steps.description: Go to the 'Security' or 'Password' section

steps.title: Enter New Password
steps.description: Type your new password

steps.title: Confirm Password
steps.description: Re-enter your new password to confirm

steps.title: Update
steps.description: Click 'Update Password' to save changes

tips: Change your password every 3-6 months for optimal security
Don't reuse old passwords
Use a password manager to keep track of complex passwords

guides.title: How to Reset Forgotten Password
guides.description: Recover access to your account if you forgot your password

content.introduction: If you've forgotten your password, you can easily reset it using your email address.

steps.title: Go to Login Page
steps.description: Navigate to the Vendda.co login page

steps.title: Click Forgot Password
steps.description: Click the 'Forgot Password?' link below the login form

steps.title: Enter Email
steps.description: Provide your registered email address

steps.title: Send Reset Link
steps.description: Click 'Send Reset Link'

steps.title: Check Email
steps.description: Look for the password reset email (check spam folder too)

steps.title: Click Reset Link
steps.description: Click the link in the email

steps.title: Enter New Password
steps.description: Create a new password

steps.title: Confirm Password
steps.description: Re-enter your new password

steps.title: Reset
steps.description: Click 'Reset Password' to complete

tips: Make sure you use the same browser all through the process
Password reset links expire after 24 hours
If you don't receive the email, check your spam folder
Contact support if you still can't access your account
content.important: For security reasons, reset links can only be used once and expire after 24 hours.

guides.title: How to Link or Unlink a Google Account
guides.description: Connect or disconnect your Google account for easier login

content.introduction: Linking a Google account allows you to sign in to Vendda.co quickly and securely. You can also unlink it if needed.

steps.title: Log in to Vendda.co
steps.description: Access your Vendda.co account

steps.title: Go to Settings
steps.description: Click your profile icon and select 'Settings' or 'Account Settings'

steps.title: Navigate to Integrations
steps.description: Go to the 'Integrations' section

steps.title: Link Google Account
steps.description: Click 'Connect with Google', sign in with your Google account, and authorize Vendda.co

steps.title: Unlink Google Account
steps.description: To unlink, click 'Disconnect' next to the Google account option

steps.title: Save Changes
steps.description: Click 'Save' to confirm your changes

tips: Ensure you have access to the Google account you link
Unlinking won't affect your Vendda.co account data
Use a Google account you regularly access for seamless login

categories.title: Store Management
categories.description: Set up and customize your online store

guides.title: How to Create a Store
guides.description: Set up your first online store on Vendda.co

content.introduction: Creating your store is the first step to selling online. Follow these steps to get your store up and running.

steps.title: Access Dashboard
steps.description: Login and navigate to your dashboard

steps.title: Create New Store
steps.description: Click 'Create New Store' or 'Add Store' button

steps.title: Enter Store Details
steps.description: Fill in store name, description, business category, and store username

steps.title: Create Store
steps.description: Click 'Create Store' and your store is live!

tips: Choose a memorable store name and username that reflects your brand
content.important: The store username become your website link... e.g nikestore.vendda.co

guides.title: How to Change Store Template
guides.description: Customize the look and feel of your store

content.introduction: Change your store's template to match your brand and style.

steps.title: Open Store Settings
steps.description: Go to your store dashboard and click 'Store'

steps.title: Click Branding
steps.description: Navigate to 'Templates' or 'Themes' section

steps.title: Browse Templates
steps.description: Explore available templates

steps.title: Preview
steps.description: Click 'Preview' to see how each template looks

steps.title: Apply Template
steps.description: Click 'Apply' or 'Use This Template' on your chosen design

steps.title: Customize
steps.description: Adjust color if needed

steps.title: Save Changes
steps.description: Click 'Save Changes' to apply the new template

tips: Choose a template that matches your products and brand
Mobile-responsive templates work better for all devices
You can change templates anytime without losing your content

guides.title: How to Enable Payment Gateway
guides.description: Set up payment methods to accept online payments

content.introduction: Enable payment gateways to start accepting payments from customers.

steps.title: Navigate to Store
steps.description: Go to 'Store'

steps.title: Payment Methods
steps.description: Click 'Payment Methods' or 'Payment Gateway'

steps.title: Enable Payment gateway
steps.description: Click 'Enable' next to your chosen gateway

steps.title: Configure Preferences
steps.description: Set currency, payment methods to accept, and transaction fee handling

steps.title: Activate
steps.description: Click 'Save' or 'Activate'

steps.title: Test Payment
steps.description: Make a small test purchase to ensure everything works

content.important: You must add delivery locations to properly activate this.

guides.title: How to Enable WhatsApp Notifications
guides.description: Get instant order updates via WhatsApp

content.introduction: Enable WhatsApp notifications to receive instant updates about orders and customer messages.

steps.title: Go to dashboard
steps.description: Go to Store

steps.title: Select Notifications
steps.description: Click 'Alerts' or 'Notifications'

steps.title: Enable WhatsApp
steps.description: Toggle the switch to 'Enable' WhatsApp Notifications

steps.title: Confirm Your Number
steps.description: Check your WhatsApp Business shown on the screen if it's correct

steps.title: Verify Number
steps.description: Click 'Verify Number' and enter the verification code sent to you

steps.title: Save Settings
steps.description: Click 'Save Settings' to activate notifications

tips: Use WhatsApp Business for better customer management features
Respond quickly to notifications to improve customer satisfaction
You can customize which notifications to receive

guides.title: How to Add Product Categories
guides.description: Organize your products into categories

content.introduction: Categories help customers find products easily and improve your store navigation.

steps.title: Go to dashboard
steps.description: Navigate to your dashboard

steps.title: Select Categories
steps.description: Click 'Store' in the sidebar, then click 'categories'

steps.title: Add New Category
steps.description: Click 'Add New Category' or 'Create Category'

steps.title: Enter Details
steps.description: Provide category name (e.g., Electronics, Clothing, Food Items)

steps.title: Save Category
steps.description: Click 'Save Category'

tips: Keep categories simple and intuitive for easy navigation
Don't create too many categories - 5-10 main categories work best
Use subcategories for better organization

guides.title: How to Add Store Locations
guides.description: Add physical store locations or branches

content.introduction: Add your physical store locations to help customers find you and enable in-store pickups.

steps.title: Open Settings
steps.description: Navigate to 'Store Settings'

steps.title: Select Locations
steps.description: Click 'Locations' or 'Store Locations'

steps.title: Add Location
steps.description: Click 'Add Location'

steps.title: Enter Details
steps.description: Provide location name/branch name, full address, city, and state

steps.title: Save Location
steps.description: Click 'Save Location'

tips: Add accurate addresses to help customers find you easily
Include clear directions or landmarks

guides.title: How to Add Delivery Locations
guides.description: Set up delivery zones and shipping fees

content.introduction: Define your delivery areas and set appropriate shipping fees for each zone.

steps.title: Go to dashboard
steps.description: Navigate to 'Store Settings'

steps.title: Shipping & Delivery
steps.description: Select 'Shipping & Delivery' or 'Delivery Locations'

steps.title: Add Location
steps.description: Click 'Add Delivery Location'

steps.title: Enter Zone Details
steps.description: Provide location name (e.g., Lagos Island, Ikeja) and delivery fee

steps.title: Set Delivery Time
steps.description: Add estimated delivery time for this area

steps.title: Group Locations
steps.description: Organize by city, state, postal code, or custom zones

steps.title: Save
steps.description: Click 'Save' and add more zones as needed

tips: For free delivery, add 1 as delivery fee
Offer free delivery for orders above a certain amount to encourage larger purchases
Be realistic with delivery timeframes

guides.title: How to Add Refund and Return Policy Page
guides.description: Create clear refund and return policies for customers

content.introduction: A clear refund and return policy builds customer trust and reduces disputes.

steps.title: Go to Settings
steps.description: Navigate to 'Store Settings'

steps.title: Select Pages
steps.description: Click 'Policies'

steps.title: Choose Policy Type
steps.description: Select 'Refund & Return Policy

steps.title: Write Policy
steps.description: Enter return eligibility (timeframe, condition), non-returnable items, refund process, and timeline

steps.title: Format Content
steps.description: Use clear headings and bullet points for readability

steps.title: Preview
steps.description: Preview the page before publishing

steps.title: Publish
steps.description: Click 'Publish' or 'Save'

tips: We have templates for both refund and return policies, you can edit and use them
Be clear about return windows (7, 14, or 30 days)
Specify which items cannot be returned
Include step-by-step return instructions
State refund timelines clearly

example.returnWindow: Items can be returned within 14 days of delivery
example.eligibleItems: Unopened, unused items in original packaging
example.refundTimeline: 5-7 business days after we receive the item

guides.title: How to Add FAQs and Answers
guides.description: Create a helpful FAQ section for customers

content.introduction: FAQs help customers find answers quickly and reduce support inquiries.

steps.title: Navigate to Settings
steps.description: Go to 'Store Settings'

steps.title: Select FAQ
steps.description: Click 'FAQ'

steps.title: Add New FAQ
steps.description: Click 'Add New FAQ' or 'Create FAQ'

steps.title: Enter Question
steps.description: Type your question in the question field

steps.title: Write Answer
steps.description: Provide a detailed, helpful answer

steps.title: Save FAQ
steps.description: Click 'Save FAQ' and repeat for more questions

tips: Answer the most common questions first
Keep answers concise but complete
Use simple language
Update FAQs based on customer inquiries
commonQuestions: What payment methods do you accept?

guides.title: How to Create a Coupon Code
guides.description: Create discount codes to attract customers

content.introduction: Coupon codes are a great way to encourage sales and reward loyal customers.

steps.title: Go to Dashboard
steps.description: Navigate to your store dashboard

steps.title: Select Discounts
steps.description: Click 'Discounts' or 'Promotions' in the sidebar

steps.title: Create Coupon
steps.description: Click 'Create Coupon' or 'Add Discount'

steps.title: Enter Coupon Details
steps.description: Specify the coupon name, discount type (percentage or fixed amount), and discount value

steps.title: Set Conditions
steps.description: Define usage limits, minimum purchase amount, applicable products, or customer groups

steps.title: Set Expiry
steps.description: Choose an expiration date for the coupon

steps.title: Save Coupon
steps.description: Click 'Save' or 'Create Coupon' to activate

tips: Use clear, memorable coupon codes (e.g., SUMMER20, FREESHIP)
Promote coupons via email or social media
Set reasonable expiration dates to create urgency
Limit coupons to specific products or categories for targeted promotions

categories.title: Product Management
categories.description: Add, edit, and manage your product inventory

guides.title: How to Add a Product
guides.description: List your first product for sale

content.introduction: Adding products is easy! Follow these steps to create your first product listing.

steps.title: Go to Products
steps.description: Click 'Products' from your dashboard

steps.title: Add New Product
steps.description: Click 'Add New Product' or 'Create Product'

steps.title: Enter Product Details
steps.description: Fill in product name, description, category, and price

steps.title: Add Pricing
steps.description: Set price and compare at price (if on sale)

steps.title: Upload Images
steps.description: Add multiple high-quality images (1000x1000px or higher)

steps.title: Set Inventory
steps.description: Enter stock quantity, enable inventory tracking, set low stock alerts

steps.title: Add Variants
steps.description: Create variants (size, color, etc.) if applicable

steps.title: Add Location
steps.description: (Optional): You can attach this to one of the store branches you have created

steps.title: Add Category
steps.description: (Optional): You can attach this to one of the categories you have created

steps.title: Publish
steps.description: Click 'Save Product'

tips: Use clear, professional photos from multiple angles
Write compelling descriptions highlighting benefits
Include specifications and dimensions
Add keywords customers might search for
Set competitive prices

guides.title: How to Edit a Product
guides.description: Update existing product information

content.introduction: Easily update your product information whenever needed.

steps.title: Navigate to Products
steps.description: Go to 'Products' in your dashboard

steps.title: Find Product
steps.description: Use search bar, filter by category, or scroll to find the product

steps.title: Open Product
steps.description: Click on the product name or 'Edit' button

steps.title: Make Changes
steps.description: Update any field: text, images, prices, stock levels, etc.

steps.title: Review Changes
steps.description: Double-check all modifications

steps.title: Update Product
steps.description: Click 'Update Product' or 'Save Changes'

tips: Regularly update product information, especially stock levels and prices
Update images if you get better product photos
Keep descriptions current with latest features
Changes go live immediately after saving

guides.title: How to Delete a Product
guides.description: Remove products from your store

content.introduction: Remove products that are no longer available or needed.

steps.title: Go to Products
steps.description: Navigate to 'Products' section

steps.title: Find Product
steps.description: Locate the product you want to delete

steps.title: Select Product
steps.description: Click on the product or select using checkbox

steps.title: Delete
steps.description: Click 'Delete' or trash icon

steps.title: Confirm Deletion
steps.description: Confirm when prompted (this action cannot be undone)

tips: Consider archiving instead of deleting if you might restock
Set product status to 'Draft' to hide without deleting
Deleted products cannot be recovered
Archive keeps product data for future reference
content.important: Deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. Consider archiving instead.

guides.title: How to Update Order Status
guides.description: Keep customers informed about their order progress

content.introduction: Updating order status keeps customers informed and builds trust.

steps.title: Go to Orders
steps.description: Navigate to 'Orders' in your dashboard

steps.title: Select Order
steps.description: Click on the order you want to update

steps.title: View Details
steps.description: Review the order details

steps.title: Find Status Section
steps.description: Locate the 'Order Status' section

steps.title: Select New Status
steps.description: Choose from: Shipped, Delivered

steps.title: Update
steps.description: Click 'Update' or 'Save'

tips: Update order status promptly to keep customers informed
Customers receive automatic notifications via email and WhatsApp (if enabled) when status changes
Include estimated delivery dates when possible

guides.title: How to Cancel an Order
guides.description: Cancel orders and process refunds

content.introduction: Cancel orders when items are unavailable or customer requests cancellation.

steps.title: Navigate to Orders
steps.description: Go to 'Orders' section

steps.title: Find Order
steps.description: Locate and click on the order to cancel

steps.title: Review Details
steps.description: Confirm it's the correct order

steps.title: Cancel Order
steps.description: Click 'Cancel Order' button

steps.title: Select Reason
steps.description: Choose cancellation reason: Out of stock, Customer requested, Payment failed, Other

steps.title: Choose Refund Option
steps.description: Select: Full refund, Partial refund, or No refund

steps.title: Add Notes
steps.description: Include cancellation notes (optional)

steps.title: Confirm
steps.description: Confirm cancellation

tips: Cancel orders as soon as possible if items cannot be fulfilled
Process refunds promptly to maintain customer satisfaction
You can only cancel orders that haven't been shipped
Communicate with customers before cancelling
Always provide a clear reason for cancellation
content.important: Customers are automatically notified when orders are cancelled.

guides.title: How to Send an Invoice
guides.description: Generate and send invoices to customers

content.introduction: Sending invoices ensures customers have clear payment instructions and order details.

steps.title: Go to Orders
steps.description: Navigate to the 'Orders' section in your dashboard

steps.title: Select Order
steps.description: Click on the order for which you want to send an invoice

steps.title: View Details
steps.description: Review the order details to ensure accuracy

steps.title: Generate Invoice
steps.description: Click 'Generate Invoice' or 'Send Invoice'

steps.title: Customize Invoice
steps.description: Add any additional notes or terms (optional)

steps.title: Send Invoice
steps.description: Click 'Send' to email the invoice to the customer

tips: Ensure all order details are correct before sending
Include payment terms and due dates
Follow up if payment is not received within the specified timeframe
Invoices are automatically saved in your records

categories.title: Billings and Subscription
categories.description: Manage your subscription plans and payments

guides.title: How to Upgrade Subscription Plan
guides.description: Upgrade to access more features and capabilities

content.introduction: Upgrade your subscription to unlock more features and grow your business.

steps.title: Access Account
steps.description: Click your profile icon or 'Account'

steps.title: Go to Billing
steps.description: Select 'Billing' or 'Subscription'

steps.title: View Current Plan
steps.description: Review your current plan details

steps.title: Upgrade Plan
steps.description: Click 'Upgrade Plan' or 'Change Plan'

steps.title: Compare Plans
steps.description: Review available plans, features, and pricing

steps.title: Select Plan
steps.description: Choose the plan you want

steps.title: Review Charges
steps.description: Check new plan price, pro-rated credit, and next billing date

steps.title: Confirm Payment
steps.description: Verify payment method

steps.title: Complete Upgrade
steps.description: Click 'Confirm Upgrade'

tips: Upgrade when you need more products or features
Plan upgrades take effect immediately
You can downgrade later if needed

guides.title: How to Add Bank Account Details
guides.description: Set up your bank account to receive payments

content.introduction: Add your bank account details to receive payments from sales processed through Vendda.co.

steps.title: Access Account
steps.description: Click your profile icon or 'Account'

steps.title: Go to Billing
steps.description: Select 'Billing' or 'Payouts'

steps.title: Add Bank Account
steps.description: Click 'Add Bank Account' or 'Set Up Payouts'

steps.title: Enter Bank Details
steps.description: Provide your bank name and account number

steps.title: Verify Details
steps.description: Ensure the account holder name matches the name registered on Vendda.co

steps.title: Save Details
steps.description: Click 'Save' to submit your bank details

steps.title: Contact Support if Needed
steps.description: If you encounter issues, contact support at support@vendda.co

tips: Double-check your bank details to avoid payment delays
Payments are automatically sent when Paystack releases funds
Contact support immediately if there's a mismatch in account names
content.important: The bank account name must match the name used to register on Vendda.co to avoid payment issues.

guides.title: How to Access Earnings
guides.description: View and manage your store earnings

content.introduction: Track your store earnings and view payout details to manage your finances.

steps.title: Go to Dashboard
steps.description: Navigate to your store dashboard

steps.title: Select Earnings
steps.description: Click 'Earnings' or 'Payouts' in the sidebar

steps.title: View Earnings
steps.description: See your total earnings, pending payouts, and payment history

steps.title: Check Payout Schedule
steps.description: Review when Paystack will release funds to your bank account

tips: Payments are automatically sent when Paystack releases funds
Regularly check your earnings to track business performance
Ensure your bank account details are correct to avoid delays
content.important: Earnings are automatically transferred to your registered bank account when Paystack releases funds.

categories.title: Analytics
categories.description: Track and analyze your store's performance

guides.title: How to Access Analytics
guides.description: View your store's performance metrics and insights

content.introduction: Accessing analytics helps you understand your store's performance, customer behavior, and sales trends.

steps.title: Go to Dashboard
steps.description: Log in and navigate to your store dashboard

steps.title: Select Analytics
steps.description: Click 'Analytics' or 'Reports' in the sidebar

steps.title: View Metrics
steps.description: Explore key metrics like sales, visitors, conversion rates, and top products

steps.title: Filter Data
steps.description: Use date ranges or other filters to analyze specific periods or segments

steps.title: Export Reports
steps.description: Download reports for further analysis if needed

tips: Regularly review analytics to identify trends and opportunities
Focus on metrics like conversion rates to optimize your store
Use insights to adjust pricing, promotions, or inventory

guides.title: How to Access and Manage Sales Records
guides.description: View and manage your sales history

content.introduction: Sales records provide a detailed history of all transactions, automatically updated for orders processed on Vendda.co.

steps.title: Go to Dashboard
steps.description: Navigate to your store dashboard

steps.title: Select Sales Records
steps.description: Click 'Sales' or 'Sales Records' in the sidebar

steps.title: View Sales
steps.description: See a list of all sales, including order details, dates, and amounts

steps.title: Add Manual Sale
steps.description: Click 'Add Sale' to manually input offline or external sales

steps.title: Enter Sale Details
steps.description: Provide product, price, and customer details for manual entries

steps.title: Save Sale
steps.description: Click 'Save' to add the manual sale to your records

tips: Orders processed on Vendda.co are automatically added to sales records
Use manual entries for offline sales to keep all records in one place
Regularly review sales records to track revenue and trends
content.important: Ensure manual entries are accurate to maintain correct financial records.

guides.title: How to Manage Customer Reviews
guides.description: Handle and respond to customer reviews

content.introduction: Managing customer reviews helps build trust and improve your store's reputation.

steps.title: Go to Dashboard
steps.description: Navigate to your store dashboard

steps.title: Select Reviews
steps.description: Click 'Reviews' or 'Customer Feedback' in the sidebar

steps.title: View Reviews
steps.description: See a list of customer reviews with ratings and comments

tips: Address negative reviews professionally to resolve issues
Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews to boost credibility
